Professional Journey

Bridging the gap between technical infrastructure and business value.

Nov 2025 - Present

Software Developer

IPspace T/A Fast Track Learning

  • Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter.
  • Designed and implemented RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.
  • Deployed and managed cloud infrastructure on AWS (EC2, RDS).
  • Implemented CI/CD pipelines to streamline development.
Feb 2026 - Present

Website Development Freelance

MultTech Consult

  • Designed and developed a business website with CMS functionality.
  • Delivered scalable and maintainable solutions aligned with business goals.
Jul 2024 - Nov 2024

Summer Intern

Orange Digital Center

  • Led a team in the Orange Summer Challenge 2024, securing 3rd place nationally.
  • Designed and monitored cloud-based applications with AWS.
Jun 2025

Backend Developer

FNB Hackathon

  • Built a fintech prototype in a 3-day national hackathon (2nd place nationally).
  • Deployed secure AWS cloud infrastructure for real-time monitoring.
